Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Leave To Amend The Answer To The Complaint To Specifically Allege The Affirmative Defense Of Usury
Off Calendar Jul-08-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
DEFENDANT WB COYLE's motion For Leave To Amend The Answer To The Complaint To Specifically Allege The Affirmative Defense Of Usury is Granted. No opposition filed. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Anthony Vaughn, CSR # 6185 =(302/EHG)

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Compel Pltff Simon Manning To Appear For Oral Deposition And Produce Documents
Off Calendar Jul-08-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances on this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. Defendant WB COYLE'S Motion to Compel Plaintiff Simon Manning to Appear for Oral Deposition and Produce Documents is GRANTED. The motion is unopposed. No costs or sanctions awarded. The prevailing party is required to prepare and submit a proposed order repeating verbatim the substantive portion of the tentative ruling. Judge Pro Tem: James P. Watson; Clerk L. Fong; matter not reported. (302/JPT)
